data.answer: The borrower over-added $30 of the $130 Device Strategy charges because the lifetime cap of $290 was exceeded; only $100 of those charges were permitted as addbacks [10].

raw: {"answer": "The borrower over-added $30 of the $130 Device Strategy charges because the lifetime cap of $290 was exceeded; only $100 of those charges were permitted as addbacks [10]."}
